## Release — Blackhole v0.6.1

### 🔧 What's new in v0.6.1

Patch fixing a regression shipped in v0.6.0: agent definitions no longer pin a specific model.

#### Agent-agnostic model selection

- **`model: sonnet` removed from all 7 roster agents.** v0.6.0 pinned every agent to a
  Claude-specific model name — meaningless on 4 of the 5 platforms this source compiles to
  (Cursor, Antigravity/Gemini, Codex CLI, skills.sh), and it silently overrode ADR-004's own
  design decision that `router` should run on a cheaper tier than the rest. A spawned subagent
  now natively inherits whatever model the primary/spawning session is running — no per-agent
  opinion baked into the source, model/cost choice stays with whoever launches the campaign.
- `scripts/verify.ts`'s `V-AGENT-01`/`V-CODEX-04` checks revert to asserting `model:` is absent.

### Verification

`bun test`: 224/224 pass. `bun run verify`: 19/19 checks pass.
